plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-191 RP05.P07.M04.S03-RP05.P07.M05.S20 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-191 binds RP05.P07.M04.S03-RP05.P07.M05.S20 as a Risk B descriptor-only Matter Core generated failure recovery and permission/audit binding pack.
